'''Malfkla Yzu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and one of the thirteen [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]] at [[Tsoss Beacon/Legends|Tsoss Beacon]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Under the Empire, Yzu was an admiral in the [[15th Deep Core Reserve Fleet/Legends|15th Deep Core Reserve Fleet]]. [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]], the [[Planetary Governor/Legends|Planetary Governor]] of [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]], became his close friend and advisor. Brill cultivated influence under [[Cinzero Gann]], who had became Yzu's political lackey, until Yzu was [[Death/Legends|killed]] at [[Tsoss Beacon/Legends|Tsoss Beacon]], a victim of Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] mass murder of the region's ranking warlords. In the power vacuum, Brill shrewdly promoted Gann as a figurehead ruler to succeed Yzu.<ref name="LOL_LOSER">''{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-3|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 3|nolive=1}}'' </ref>
